about: CityCare Clinic is the private practice of Dr. Zainab Ali, a general physician, for checkups and consultations. Warm, friendly service, short waiting times, and affordable rates. Appointments can be booked right here on WhatsApp.
hours: Monday to Thursday 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM, Friday 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM, Saturday 10:00 AM to 2:00 PM. Closed on Sundays.

faqs.a: Walk-ins are welcome, but appointments are given priority. You can book one right here on WhatsApp.
You'll see Dr. Zainab Ali, our general physician. She is available during the clinic's working hours.

faqs.q: What payment methods do you accept?
